---
title: Resources
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
---


# blogroll

```{r blogroll}
library(readr)
library(here)
library(gt)
library(dplyr)
readr::read_csv(here('collections', 'blogroll.csv')) |>
  mutate(
    link = paste0(
      "[",
      gsub("^https://www\\.|^https://|\\.html$", "", link),
      "](",
      link,
      ")"
    )
  ) |>
  gt() |>
  fmt_markdown(columns = link) |>
  cols_label(link = "Items", author = '', description = '') |>
  tab_options(
    column_labels.border.top.style = "hidden",
    table.border.top.style = "none",
    table.border.bottom.style = "hidden",
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = "bottom",
      color = "#e2e2e2",
      weight = px(0.25)
    ),
    locations = cells_body()
  )
```
